milestones.title: Started Career as Frontend Developer
milestones.description: Joined as a junior frontend developer specializing in Angular applications

milestones.title: Promoted to Senior Frontend Developer
milestones.description: Led frontend architecture decisions and mentored junior developers
milestones.impact: Increased team productivity by 40% through code review and best practices

milestones.title: Became Ionic Specialist
milestones.description: Completed 5+ cross-platform mobile projects using Ionic framework
milestones.impact: Enabled company to offer mobile solutions across iOS and Android

milestones.title: Mastered Angular Signals
milestones.description: Led migration of 3 projects from RxJS to Angular Signals
milestones.impact: 30% reduction in bundle size and improved performance metrics

milestones.title: Lead Frontend Engineer
milestones.description: Promoted to lead position managing 5 engineers and multiple projects
milestones.impact: Established frontend standards, mentored team, delivered 8 major projects

milestones.title: WCAG 2.1 Accessibility Expert
milestones.description: Certified and implementing WCAG 2.1 AA compliance across all projects
milestones.impact: Made portfolio accessible to 15% more users with disabilities

milestones.title: Full-Stack Development Expertise
milestones.description: Expanded skills to include backend services and DevOps practices
milestones.impact: End-to-end project ownership and faster delivery cycles

milestones.title: AI/ML Integration Specialist
milestones.description: Integrated AI features and machine learning models into web applications
milestones.impact: Enhanced 4 applications with predictive features and smart recommendations
